Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pacific Cement To Respond To Form And Special Interrogatories, To Deem Request For Admissions Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-23-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Joshua Zlotlow, appeared via telephone for Plaintiff/Moving party
Neil Jacob Rosenbaum, appeared for Defendant/Opposing party

Hearing held. Plaintiff CEMEX CONSTRUCTION MATERIALS L.P.'s Motion To Compel Defendant Pacific Cement To Respond To Form and Special Interrogatories, and To Deem Request For Admissions Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. The Requests for Admission are deemed admitted. Defendant Pacific Cement is ordered to respond to the form and special interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $720, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
Tentative ruling adopted except as they relate to the requests for admissions being deemed admitted. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pacific Sand & Gravel, Inc. To Respond To Form And Special Interrogatories, To Deem Request For Admissions Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-23-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Joshua Zlotlow, appeared via telephone for Plaintiff/Moving party
Neil Jacob Rosenbaum, appeared for Defendant/Opposing party

Hearing held. Plaintiff CEMEX CONSTRUCTION MATERIALS, L.P.s' Motion To Compel Defendant Pacific Sand & Gravel, Inc. To Respond To Form and Special Interrogatories, To Deem Request For Admissions Admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. The Requests for Admission are deemed admitted. Defendant Pacific Sand & Gravel is ordered to respond to the form and special interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $720, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
Tentative ruling adopted except as they relate to the request for admissions being deemed admitted. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
